title: Recovery of stolen vehicle in Cradock
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NEWS - According to information received from SAPS Media Representative, Col. Ursula Roelofse, an intelligence driven operation led to the recovery of a stolen vehicle in Cradock on 26 September.","html":"CRADOCK NEWS - According to information received from SAPS Media Representative, Col. Ursula Roelofse, an intelligence driven operation led to the recovery of a stolen vehicle in Cradock on 26 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"On 25 September at 15:15 members from the Cradock k9 unit, Sgt Du Plessis and his team, who was off-duty received information of a suspected stolen white Toyota Rumion vehicle in the area .","html":"On 25 September at 15:15 members from the Cradock k9 unit, Sgt Du Plessis and his team, who was off-duty received information of a suspected stolen white Toyota Rumion vehicle in the area ."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The K9 unit as well as Highway patrol,  with the assistance of a local security company, immediately responded and searched for the vehicle which was subsequently spotted in Frere Street, Cradock."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The vehicle was positively identified , stopped, and searched, and upon testing the vin number on the chassis, it was found that the vehicle was reported stolen on a Samora Machel case number.","html":"The vehicle was positively identified , stopped, and searched, and upon testing the vin number on the chassis, it was found that the vehicle was reported stolen on a Samora Machel case number."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two suspects, a 32 year old male and 34 year old female, were arrested, and the vehicle and cellphones were seized.","html":"Two suspects, a 32 year old male and 34 year old female, were arrested, and the vehicle and cellphones were seized."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Organised Crime Unit will continue with the investigation.","html":"The Organised Crime Unit will continue with the investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspects are being detained for unlawful possession of suspected stolen property .","html":"The suspects are being detained for unlawful possession of suspected stolen property ."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Chris Hani District Commissioner Major General Rudolph Adolph commended the members on the swift reaction that made the recovery and arrests possible.","html":"The Chris Hani District Commissioner Major General Rudolph Adolph commended the members on the swift reaction that made the recovery and arrests possible."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Recovery of stolen vehicle in Cradock
